notes:
v1.6.1 Update
- Shop Directory toolbar reopening: the same Shops tool can reopen the directory after its window is closed, without switching to another control first.
- Frenzy category icons: configured Font Awesome icons now appear in the category list, modal header, and item badges. Categories with no icon keep the themed SVG fallback.

v1.6.0 Update
- Spend-to-unlock items: a shop item can stay locked until a buyer has spent a set amount at that shop. Set the threshold per item in Shop Settings; the buy button stays disabled and shows how much more is needed until the buyer's total spend at that shop reaches it. Spend is tracked per buyer per shop and enforced server-side.
- The per-item requirements section in Shop Settings is now collapsible and collapsed by default, with a requirement count and a lock badge on its header, so item rows stay compact.

v1.5.1 Update
- Display Stats can now show list values such as a RuneQuest armour's covered hit locations, which previously appeared blank.

v1.5.0 Update
- Item purchase requirements: shop items can now require the buyer to own specific items before purchasing, with quantity and optional consume settings. The purchase confirmation dialog shows a live requirement block.
- Requirement editor in Shop Settings: add, edit, and remove requirements per item. Drop a Foundry Item onto a row to auto-fill UUID, name, and thumbnail.
- Key Hints option: toggle to hide each theme's bottom key-hint and navigation footer.
- Shop entry methods: choose whether each shop opens through the G-key proximity prompt, double-clicking the shop token, or both.
- Randomized shop prices: set a Price Variance (%) default per shop or per item for stable random pricing.
- Personal discounts: give individual buyer actors a percent discount that stacks with the shop multiplier and per-item discount.
- Requirements in item detail panel: the focused item detail panel now shows purchase requirements alongside stats and description.
- Purchase requirement UI per theme: theme-specific styling for requirement blocks across all shipped themes.
- Grid theme item thumbnails: grid themes now show each item's artwork in buy and sell rows instead of category glyphs.
- Vendor currency on item purchase: fixed shop actor not receiving currency on purchase when infinite funds was disabled.
- Subfolder-hosted Foundry instances: fixed GlitchSmith Library imports for Foundry served under a route prefix.
- Frenzy detail pane scroll: fixed the item detail panel not scrolling in the Frenzy theme.

announcement.title: 🛍️ Stylish Shop v1.6.1
announcement.content:
Stylish Shop v1.6.1 fixes two shop interface issues.

  • The Shops toolbar tool can reopen the Shop Directory after the window is closed without switching controls first.
  • Frenzy category icon settings now apply to the category list, modal header, and item badges. Categories with no icon keep the themed SVG fallback.
